sourceInputs.userInstruction: Create a named target-house-3 BIM seed model from target-house-2.png and the supplied floorplan, usable as a project-initiation starting point with the target-house-2 clearance and clash warnings resolved.

dominantVolumes.description: oversized smooth white upper wrapper shell with roof plane and side walls reading as one folded object
vertically clad ground-floor base with visible living/dining glazing and carport recess
deep upper-front/right loggia inside a thick white frame, divided by glazing and a vertical-clad pier
open-to-sky roof court cut into the upper left/back roof field as seen in target-house-2.png

nonNegotiables: target-house-2.png is the primary visual target and the saved main view must read from the front-right axonometric corner
white roof/wall wrapper must not read as a dark conventional roof
roof court/terrace must be visible as a cutout with white return faces and terrace assets
front loggia must be recessed behind a thick white frame with black guard rail and dark mullions
ground floor, feature screen, and central upper pier use vertical cladding
living/dining, kitchen, bedrooms, bathrooms, carport, and terrace programme assets must be represented
forbiddenOutcomes: generic gable roof on a box
semantic-only roof opening that does not render
conceptual mass elements left in the final envelope
room-separation workaround replacing real partitions and doors

requiredViews.purpose: Target-house-3 front-right axonometric showing wrapper, loggia, roof court, ground cladding, lower glazing, and carport recess.
Front facade evidence for loggia bay rhythm, rail, ground openings, and cladding.
High axonometric proving the roof court reads as an occupied void.
Rear/right view checking roof-court depth and white return faces.
Ground-floor plan topology and room/stair/access check.
Upper-floor plan topology, roof-court access, loggia, and stair opening check.
Section/diagnostic view through the front loggia and wrapper frame.

assumptions.statement: target-house-2.png is the primary target for target-house-3; the same 14 m x 10 m floorplan is viewed from the front-right, so roof court and loggia appear mirrored relative to target-house-1.png.
Floorplan dimensions 14 m by 10 m override earlier approximate brief dimensions for this rebuild.
assumptions.validation: Cross-check generated exterior footprint and room target areas against source/floorplan.png dimensions.

assumptions.statement: The folded wrapper is assembled from typed walls, an asymmetric roof, frame sweeps, and return walls until a native folded-shell primitive exists.
assumptions.validation: Inspect vp-main-iso, vp-front-elev, and vp-roof-court screenshots for a continuous white wrapper silhouette.

assumptions.statement: Vertical cladding intent is carried by material/layer metadata; board grooves need live renderer review and may remain a visual tolerance.
assumptions.validation: Inspect front and side screenshots and material schedule rows for cladding_beige_grey on the ground base and loggia pier.

materialIntent.surface: continuous folded upper wrapper, roof plane, fascia, side walls, loggia frame, roof-court returns, and plinth
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png shows the upper wall and roof as one smooth matte white wrapper, not a dark pitched roof.

materialIntent.surface: ground-floor base cladding and central upper loggia pier
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png and floorplan call out the vertically clad lower base and feature cladding screen.

materialIntent.surface: roof court / terrace walking surface and exposed slab edges
materialIntent.evidence: the roof court reads as a flat occupied terrace floor inside the roof cutout.

materialIntent.surface: large loggia glazing, ground sliding doors, roof-court door, and roof-court guard
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png uses grey transparent glazing across the loggia, lower living area, and roof-court void.

materialIntent.surface: thin balcony and stair guard linework plus aluminium frames
materialIntent.evidence: the sketch has crisp dark mullions and black horizontal guard rails.
